title: Crash related to data types and `super.new` call

features.name: class constructor super.new call with missing dtype
features.description: Code should include a class inheritance hierarchy where a derived class constructor calls super.new() and the NEW expression node lacks proper dtype information

features.name: nested class constructor with super.new chaining
features.description: Code should include multiple levels of class inheritance with nested constructor calls that chain through super.new()
